project_identity.emotional_tone: Edgy, premium, mysterious, sharp, metallic, minimalist
project_identity.visual_mood: High contrast, stark minimalism, sharp edges, metallic/chrome textures

color_system.notes: Strictly black, white, and grey palette. No saturated colors. Pure black background to let the chrome tribal elements and product photography pop.

monospace.styles: Uppercase, tracking-widest, used for labels, SKUs, and small overlines

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento Grid for collections (Tetris mode), stark architectural grid for products.
spacing_and_layout.padding: Generous spacing. p-8, p-12, p-16 for containers to create emptiness and focus.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Optical alignment, asymmetrical balance. Left-align most text for brutalist feel.

surface_strategies.cards: Flat background (#0A0A0A), 1px solid border (#262626), 0px border radius, no box-shadow.
surface_strategies.header: Solid pure black background or heavy glassmorphism (bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-xl) with a 1px bottom border.
surface_strategies.buttons: Invert style. Primary CTA is pure white background with black text, no border radius. Hover: black background, white text, 1px white border.

components.buttons: Sharp edges, dense padding (px-8 py-3). Font mono for button text. Use data-testid on all interactive elements.
components.inputs: Shadcn input overridden with rounded-none, border-b only (or full 1px border), pure black bg, white text.
components.navigation: Minimalist header, visible links on desktop, pure white logo.
components.icons: lucide-react with thin stroke-width (1.5 or 1) for a precise, sharp look.

images.description: SEVYN chrome metallic logo. Use in header and footer.
Gothic tribal chrome design element. Use as floating background asset, hero overlay, or section dividers.
Dark fashion hoodie product shot alternative
Abstract metallic wave pattern, use as hero section background with heavy black overlay or blend mode.

media.guidelines: NEVER use placeholders. Use only the provided URLs. Overlay images with bg-black/40 if text needs to go over them. Use mix-blend-screen for the tribal design element if needed to make it pop over pure black.

motion_and_interactions.hover: High contrast transitions. Immediate impact, ease-out-expo.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Fade to black. Smooth scrolling using Lenis.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Shadcn UI for forms, cart, auth, but strip border-radius to 0 (rounded-none) and customize to strict black/white/grey.
Implement PayPal integration as required by user for the checkout split.
Use the provided SEVYN logo URL in the Navigation Bar and Footer.
Integrate the 'Gothic tribal chrome' design element URL as decorative background graphics in the Hero section and throughout the page.
Use JetBrains Mono for SKUs, Prices, and Labels. Use Cabinet Grotesk for massive Impact Headings.
Create a responsive 'Bento Grid' or 'Editorial Asymmetric' layout for the product listing page.
Ensure the entire app is STRICTLY dark mode. Pure black (#000000) background.
Do NOT use tailwind colors like blue, red, teal, etc., except for maybe a tiny danger red (#FF3B30) if absolutely needed for errors, but preferably stick to white/grey/black.
Every button and key interactive element MUST have a descriptive `data-testid`.
